login.title: Sign In
login.heading: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your DibbyIAM account

registerConfirmation.title: Check Your Email
registerConfirmation.heading: Check your email
registerConfirmation.subtitleBefore: We've sent a confirmation link to
registerConfirmation.instruction: Click the link in the email to activate your account. If you don't see it, check your spam folder.

confirmEmail.successSubtitle: Your email has been verified successfully
confirmEmail.failSubtitle: The confirmation link is invalid or has expired

resendConfirmation.sentSubtitle: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a new confirmation link
resendConfirmation.formSubtitle: Enter your email to receive a new confirmation link

forgotPassword.sentSubtitle: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a password reset link
forgotPassword.formSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link

resetPassword.successSubtitle: Your password has been changed successfully
resetPassword.successSignIn: Sign in with your new password

loginWith2fa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
loginWith2fa.heading: Two-factor authentication
loginWith2fa.subtitle: Enter the code from your authenticator app

loginWithRecoveryCode.title: Recovery Code
loginWithRecoveryCode.heading: Recovery code
loginWithRecoveryCode.subtitle: Enter one of your recovery codes to sign in

consent.title: Authorize Application
consent.heading: Authorize access
consent.subtitleSuffix: would like permission to access your account.
consent.revokeNote: You can revoke this access at any time.

scopes.profile: Access your name and profile information
scopes.api: Access API resources on your behalf
scopes.payment: Process payments using your saved payment methods

index.title: My Applications
index.emptyPrompt: You haven't registered any applications yet.

register.title: Register Application
register.heading: Register New Application
register.subtitle: Create OAuth 2.0 credentials for your application
register.redirectUriHint: The URI your app redirects to after authorization
register.postLogoutUriHint: Optional. Where to redirect after sign-out
register.descriptionPlaceholder: A brief description of your application...

created.title: Application Created
created.heading: Application Registered
created.secretWarning: Copy your client secret now. You will not be able to see it again.
created.goToApps: I've copied my secret — Go to My Apps

edit.title: Edit Application
edit.heading: Edit Application
edit.subtitle: Manage your OAuth 2.0 application settings
edit.clientSecretDescription: Generate a new secret. The old secret will stop working immediately.
edit.regenerateConfirm: Are you sure? The current client secret will be permanently invalidated.
edit.stripeNotConnected: Connect your Stripe account to accept payments via Dibby.
edit.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect Stripe account? Users will no longer be able to pay with saved cards.
edit.deleteDescription: This will permanently revoke all tokens and remove the OAuth client.
edit.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this application? This action cannot be undone.

connectStripe.title: Connect Stripe
connectStripe.heading: Connecting to Stripe...
connectStripe.redirecting: You are being redirected to Stripe to connect your account.
